highlights.description: Multi-domain specification orchestration for humans and AI agents
MCP server integration for Claude Code and Kiro CLI
AI-assisted authoring workflow with draft management and LLM evaluation

added.description: Core type definitions for spec types, evaluation, and project configuration
Spec templates with `go:embed` for MRD, PRD, UXD, Press, FAQ, Narrative, TRD, IRD
Evaluation rubrics for all spec types using categorical scoring (pass/partial/fail)
Draft authoring workflow with session management, versioning, and eval history
LLM evaluation integration with structured-evaluation rubrics
Spec synthesis from source documents (GTM and technical)
Spec reconciliation for generating unified execution specs
Export framework with SpecKit adapter (spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md)
MCP server with tools: list_projects, get_project_status, start_draft, update_draft, eval_draft, finalize_draft, get_draft, discard_draft
CLI commands: init, lint, status, targets, eval
Authoring skills for Claude Code: author-mrd, author-prd, author-uxd

changed.description: Rubrics updated to use `CategoricalCriteria` type from structured-evaluation v0.4.0
All rubrics converted to categorical scoring (pass/partial/fail)
Evaluation module updated for categorical scoring

fixed.description: Draft paths now use `filepath.Join` for Windows compatibility
Unused parameter lint warning in speckit.go

tests.description: Rubric tests updated for categorical scoring

documentation.description: README with project overview, installation, and CLI documentation

build.description: Go module initialization with build configuration

dependencies.description: Add structured-evaluation v0.5.0 for rubric and evaluation types
